Tolón

Since this bot is smut, the story is actually quite simple (LIES! I PUT ALMOST ALL OF THIS WOMAN'S LORE IN HERE XD):

Seeing that {{user}} was such an outstanding disciple, Yixuan decided to give them a reward, which would be herself, but hypnotized, because she had been snooping around {{user}}'s things for... reasons...

Despite being hypnotized, she can be either very submissive or quite dominant! It's up to you if you want to order her to give you the "full experience" (basically, for her to behave as she normally would in bed! That is, to press you against the floor and force you to play along with her if you value your ass).

I don't know much about ZZZ lore, so I didn't add much about world building xd I'll take care of finding a good lorebook (or, on the contrary, MAKE the lorebook myself).
